Klein Moretti.eye_color: brown (turns deep black during divination or Cogitation)
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: Silk hat, black Victorian suit, holding a black cane
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Hears illusory whispers of 'Hornacis... Flegrea...' when near Antigonus-related locations
Klein Moretti.accessories: Dark gold member cufflinks with Hermes root word for 'fortune-teller' inscribed, topaz pendant hanging from his sleeve
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Details on his new club membership items and tools.

Glacis.primary_clothing: white shirt and black vest, monocle hanging from his chest
Glacis.face_description: Slightly dark skin with dark green pupils, topped with soft light yellow hair
Glacis.visual_anchor: mid-30s male, slightly dark skin, soft light yellow hair, dark green eyes, wearing a white shirt and black vest with a monocle
Glacis.color_palette: black, white, light yellow, dark green
Glacis.distinguishing_features: Slightly dark skin, dark green pupils

Hanass Vincent.hair_style: thick and hard, each strand standing firmly like porcupine’s spikes
Hanass Vincent.face_description: Middle-aged man with very obvious dark circles under his eyes.
Hanass Vincent.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, brown hair thick and spiky like a porcupine, obvious dark circles under eyes, wearing a black classic robe
Hanass Vincent.color_palette: charcoal grey, deep blue, crisp white
Hanass Vincent.accessories: Silver-coated mirror used for magic mirror divination
Hanass Vincent.source_notes: Detailed physical description and clothing provided during his lecture at the club.

Edward Steve.primary_clothing: White long-sleeved shirt, black buttoned vest, dark Victorian trousers
Edward Steve.face_description: Youthful and friendly face with approachable features and a welcoming, self-deprecating smile.
Edward Steve.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short neat black hair, wearing a white shirt and black vest, friendly and approachable expression
Edward Steve.color_palette: stark white, deep black, slate grey
Edward Steve.distinguishing_features: Often speaks with self-deprecating humor regarding his divination skills
Edward Steve.source_notes: Introduced as a club member specializing in tarot and poker who greets Klein.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.

Henry Augustus I.primary_clothing: royal attire with a white hair band
Henry Augustus I.face_description: Rotund face with slender eyes and an abnormally serious expression.
Henry Augustus I.visual_anchor: adult male, rotund face, slender eyes, abnormally serious expression, wearing a white hair band.
Henry Augustus I.source_notes: Described from his portrait on the five-pound note.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Eyes turn pitch-black during specific ritualistic channeling
Old Neil.source_notes: Text explicitly states he is a Seer and mentions him rubbing a moonstone on his wrist. Also confirmed he earns 12 pounds a week but has a 30-pound debt.
